site.title: Chantilly Rugby
site.tagline: Rugby Olympique Club de Chantilly — Tradition, Excellence, Community

hero.headline: RUGBY.
hero.sub: More than a club — a tradition of excellence rooted in the heart of Chantilly. Join the passion of the oval ball.

tradition.title: Tradition
tradition.body: Heirs to a prestigious history, we cultivate the fundamental values that have shaped the nobility of rugby for generations.

excellence.title: Excellence
excellence.body: The standard of the elite, on and off the pitch. We train tomorrow's champions with rigor and passion.

community.title: Community
community.body: A tight-knit family where every member, supporter or partner contributes to the unique spirit of Chantilly Rugby.

partners.title: Become a Partner
partners.kicker: Support the ambition of a historic club
partners.body: Align your business with the values of courage, solidarity, and excellence of Chantilly Rugby. As a partner, you gain premium visibility at our matches, privileged access to our local business network, and you directly support the development of our young talent.

form.messagePlaceholder: Tell us how you'd like to support us...

matches.title: Upcoming matches
matches.body: All our matches, home and away. The full calendar will be available soon.
matches.placeholder: The full schedule will be published as soon as the season opens.

school.title: Training the next generation
school.body: From 5 to 18, the R.O.C.C. Rugby School trains the club's future talent in the spirit of rugby's core values: courage, solidarity, fun.

cta.body: Player, volunteer, or partner — join the Chantilly Rugby Union adventure. Together, let's fly the colors of our town high.

footer.tagline: The reference club in the Oise. Training, competition, and camaraderie at the heart of Chantilly country.
footer.rights: © 2026 Rugby Olympique Club de Chantilly. Excellence & Tradition.
